subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.35
question_html:
Which reaction involves homolytic fission?

A.  CH4 + Cl2

B.  CH3Br + NaOH

C.  (CH3)3CBr + NaOH

D.  C6H6 + HNO3 + H2SO4
examiners_html: A well answered question. 66% of the candidates identified the chlorination of methane as the reaction involving homolytic bond fission.
